## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] No new dependencies, or I've justified the new dependency in the description.
- [ ] If user-facing, the README reflects the change.
- [ ] No emojis / icon glyphs were added to the rendered UI.
- [ ] Manual check: `node bin/cli.js <username>` and (if website changed) `npm run dev` inside `website/`.
